Container.Name: reminders-app
Container.Overview: Single-user goal tracker with push reminders, calendar heatmap, streaks, and PWA install. Pairs with the reminders-postgres and reminders-cron containers.
Container.Requires: 1) The "reminders" Docker network must exist (Unraid → Docker → add network "reminders" with the bridge driver). 2) The reminders-postgres container should be running. 3) Install reminders-cron after this one so cron picks up the labels.
Container.Description:
Accountability app — personal goal tracker with push reminders.
**Image source:** This template pulls `ghcr.io/copesacola/reminders-app:latest`, built and published by the GitHub Actions workflow in this repo on every push to `main`.
**Before adding:**
1. After the first GitHub Actions run, make the GHCR package public: GitHub profile → Packages → reminders-app → Package settings → Change visibility → Public. Otherwise Unraid can't pull the image. 2. In Unraid → **Docker → Network → Add Network**: name "reminders", driver "bridge". Click Apply. 3. Install the **reminders-postgres** template first. 4. Install this template, fill in env vars, click Apply. 5. Install the **reminders-cron** template last.
**Required env vars** (see fields below): - DATABASE_URL — points at the postgres container by name - APP_PASSWORD — your login password - SESSION_SECRET — 32+ char random hex - VAPID_PUBLIC_KEY / VAPID_PRIVATE_KEY — for Web Push - CRON_SECRET — bearer token Ofelia uses when firing cron endpoints - APP_TIMEZONE — IANA timezone (e.g. America/New_York)
**Cron schedules** are baked into this container's labels (see ExtraParams). Ofelia reads them and fires `fire-cron reminders` every 15 minutes and `fire-cron weekly-digest` every Sunday at 18:00 in your APP_TIMEZONE. To change a schedule, edit ExtraParams above and click Apply.
**Updating:** Click "Force update" in the Unraid container actions to pull the latest image. Migrations run automatically on each start.

Config.Name: WebUI Port
Config.Description: HTTP port the app listens on. Point your reverse proxy / Cloudflare Tunnel at this.

Config.Name: DATABASE_URL
Config.Description: Postgres connection string. Host is the postgres container name (reminders-postgres). User/password/db must match the postgres container's env vars.

Config.Name: APP_PASSWORD
Config.Description: The password you'll use to log into the app. Pick something strong.

Config.Name: SESSION_SECRET
Config.Description: 32+ character random hex for cookie encryption. Generate with: docker run --rm node:20-alpine node -e "console.log(require('crypto').randomBytes(32).toString('hex'))"

Config.Name: VAPID_PUBLIC_KEY
Config.Description: VAPID public key for Web Push. Generate the pair with: docker run --rm node:20-alpine sh -c 'npm install -g web-push && web-push generate-vapid-keys'

Config.Name: VAPID_PRIVATE_KEY
Config.Description: VAPID private key (paired with the public key above).

Config.Name: VAPID_SUBJECT
Config.Description: Contact email for the Web Push spec. Format: mailto:you@example.com

Config.Name: CRON_SECRET
Config.Description: Bearer token Ofelia sends when hitting /api/cron/*. Any random string.

Config.Name: APP_TIMEZONE
Config.Description: IANA timezone for date math. e.g. America/New_York, Europe/London, Asia/Tokyo.

Config.Name: DATABASE_SSL
Config.Description: Leave blank for local Docker Postgres. Set to 'require' for hosted Postgres with strict cert verification, or 'loose' to accept self-signed certs.
